title: Federation Architecture
description: How to build a portfolio of interconnected websites that signal authority and share structured data. The federation model explained in practice.
about: Federation is how small site owners create scale without a team. This channel documents how properties in the portfolio link, signal, and share data -- and how that structure pays off in AI-era search.
